zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Saville於1478年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾博爾頓 珀西時，她的父親Nicholas de Saville39歲，母親Ann de Standisfield29歲。她於1493年與John Leavitt在英國英格蘭越可爾博爾頓 珀西結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1554年在英國英格蘭賀特福爾享年76歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Saville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin; Yorkshire): habitational name from a place in northern France of which the identity is not clear, though it is probably Sainville in Eure-et-Loire, so called from Old French saisne ‘Saxon’ + ville ‘settlement’. Compare Savel , Savell , and Savelle .

variants.name: Savel
meanings: Slovak and Czech (Šavel): from the Biblical personal name Šavel, Hebrew Shaul (see Saul ). It may be a nickname for a godless person, from the archaic word šavel, which is derived from the Biblical name.

Slovenian (Šavel): probably from an old spelling of the Biblical personal name Savel (see Saul , compare 2 above). Alternatively, perhaps a nickname or a topographic name from an old vernacular spelling of the same plant name as in 4 below.
Americanized form of Slovenian Šavelj: probably a nickname or a topographic name from the plant name š(č)avelj ‘sorrel (Rumex acetosa)’.

variants.name: Savelle
meanings: English: variant of   Saville  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Saffell
meanings: English (Essex): from the Middle English personal name Safugel (Old Norse sǽfogl ‘sea-bird, especially the cormorant’), not recorded as a personal name in Scandinavia, but common in England after the Norman Conquest. In some cases with voicing of intervocalic /f/ to /v/, there may have been confusion with Saville .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Saville was born in 1478, in Bolton Percy, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Nicholas de Saville, was 39 and her mother, Ann de Standisfield, was 29. She married John Leavitt in 1493, in Bolton Percy, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1554, in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76.

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Saville(이)가 1478년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 볼턴 퍼시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas de Saville(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ann de Standisfield(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1493년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 볼턴 퍼시에서 John Leavitt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1554년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Saville родилась в 1478 г. в местности болтон пирси, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Nicholas de Saville было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann de Standisfield, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Leavitt в 1493 г. в местности болтон пирси, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1554 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет.
